package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gin_engine_as_global_singleton: Package-level `*gin.Engine` singletons reused across unrelated startup paths.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule039NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule039NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule039NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario039Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule039NegativeService, input Rule039NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
